    Washington Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

    137 senior living communities in Washington. Pick your region - each color on the map is one region - and browse its communities city by city.

    What's available in Washington

    • Assisted Living - 75
    • Memory Care - 73
    • Independent Living - 60
    • Skilled Nursing - 37
    • Small Care Home - 28
    • Respite Care - 16
    • CCRC / Life Plan - 7

    How Washington regulates senior care

    Assisted living facilities and Adult Family Homes are licensed by DSHS; Washington has one of the largest small-home (Adult Family Home) sectors in the country. Lookup: Washington DSHS Aging and Long-Term Support Administration.

    Washington money questions

    • What senior living costs in Washington
    • Does Washington Medicaid pay for senior care?
    • Cost calculator

    New to this?

    Browse Washington by region

    • Seattle & Puget Sound

      58 communities

      Arlington, Auburn, Bellevue, Bothell, Des Moines, Edmonds, Everett, Federal Way, Issaquah, Kenmore, Kent, Kirkland, Lynnwood, Marysville, Mercer Island, Mukilteo, Redmond, Renton, Seattle, Snohomish, Stanwood, Woodinville

    • South Sound & Peninsula

      27 communities

      Bremerton, Chehalis, Gig Harbor, Lacey, Lakewood, Olympia, Poulsbo, Puyallup, Sequim, Shelton, Silverdale, Sumner, Tacoma, University Place

    • Southwest Washington

      22 communities

      Battle Ground, Camas, Longview, Vancouver, Washougal

    • Eastern & Central Washington

      27 communities

      East Wenatchee, Ellensburg, Kennewick, Moses Lake, Richland, Spokane, Spokane Valley, Walla Walla, Wenatchee, Yakima

    • Other Areas

      3 communities

      Bellingham, Mount Vernon

    • Privacy Policy

    Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families, and the resident's quality of life comes first here - then the family, then the facility. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice - for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Listings are never paid placements. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities. Terms · Privacy.
